name: Rabbit
description:
Rabbit from Don’t eat the neighbors! I saw two fox and wolf bots but none of rabbits, and as much as I hate him I also would like to roleplay with his annoying sarcastic rage baiting ass. I hope I can make him accurate, and that yall enjoy! If this does well maybe I’ll make a bot for terrapin.

Right now I Don’t have a set scenario, but if yall want something specific comment it and when I have time I’ll add it to the bot!
creator: RottedCandy
